name: LedgerClassificationProjectionContracts
description: The exact purpose-scoped public LEDGER projection, category snapshot, lifecycle fingerprint, selected-item mutation state, drift preconditions, and assignment/correction subset consumed by CLASSIFY.
schema_def: ClassificationProjectionRequest(purpose=evaluation|apply_preflight, item_projection=classification_v1, categorization_state=requires_independent_decision when evaluation, transaction_ids[] required and bounded when apply_preflight, cursor?); ClassificationProjectionDescriptor(contract_version, projection_version, store_generation_fingerprint, snapshot_id, expires_at, category_identity_lifecycle_fingerprint, active_categories[]); ClassificationProjectionItem(ordinal, transaction_id, account_id, effective_date, signed_amount, source_description, amount_direction, category_mutation_state=assignable|correctable|ineligible, current_category_id?, current_allocation_id?, transaction_revision, relationship_revision, allocation_revision); CategoryIdentity(category_id, display_name, lifecycle_state); LedgerCategoryMutation(operation_id, transaction_id, category_id, expected_transaction_revision, expected_relationship_revision, expected_allocation_revision, expected_active_allocation_id?, reason?, idempotency_key); LedgerCategoryMutationResult(allocation_id, prior_allocation_id?, transaction_id, category_id, outcome). Evaluation returns only requires_independent_decision items. Apply preflight returns every explicitly selected ID or a stable missing result; CLASSIFY rejects the whole run unless every item is assignable or explicitly correctable. Assignment requires expected_active_allocation_id absent and atomically asserts no active allocation. Correction requires the exact current allocation ID and owner reason. Any revision or allocation mismatch is a stable stale-precondition result before mutation.
